prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为16220→17427→18368→19881→20633，连续5年后移，累计后移约4413名；近3年加速后移，年均后移约1100名；2025年基准位次 约20633名；2021–2025年本省物理类计划分别为78、78、72、70、64人，呈逐年递减趋势；2026年计划75人，较2025年增加11人（+17.2%），为近5年首 次扩招，竞争压力有所缓解但扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年88名、2022年89名、2023年88名、2024年92名、2 025年84名、2026年89名，排名稳定在80–92区间，属中上水平211；声誉文件未见长安大学相关负面舆情，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第83位，评价为「一般 」，综合热度约27.7万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；投档异常文件无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，长安大学仅「交 通运输工程」获评A-，无A或A+学科，A-及以上学科数量少于10个；交通运输工程为该校王牌，与招生专业中的交通运输、交通工程、道路桥梁与渡河工程等直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 长安大学位于陕西西安，与重庆同属西部，地域接受度较高；该校在重庆招生占比约2.5%（ 2025年），非本地生源主力省份，无特殊地域偏好影响；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业为高热推荐，长安大学均开设相关专业，对考生吸引力较强；土木建筑类社会热度分化观望至明显劝退， 该校土木类、建筑类招生位次靠后；本省2026年普通高考总人数209000人，较2025年（212851人）略减，按近年比例估算物理类约136895人，较2025年（139478人）减少约2583人 （-1.85%），竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划扩招11人（+17.2%）、本省物理类考生略减约1.85%以及学校 声誉平稳等因素：扩招使竞争略减（位次数字增大），考生减少亦使竞争略减（位次数字减小），两者方向一致；但近年位次后移惯性较强，且扩招幅度不足以扭转长期下行趋势 。，考虑考生减少的缓和效应，微调后预测2026年物理类最低位次约22711名，区间22211–23211名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 16220 → 17427 → 18368 → 19881 → 20633, shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 4413 places; the shift accelerated in the last 3 years, averaging about 1100 places per year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 20633; from 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans in this province for Physics Category were 78, 78, 72, 70, and 64 respectively, showing a decreasing trend year by year; the 2026 plan is 75 students, an increase of 11 students (+17.2%) compared to 2025, marking the first expansion in nearly 5 years, which alleviates competition pressure but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Rankings were 88th in 2021, 89th in 2022, 88th in 2023, 92nd in 2024, 84th in 2025, and 89th in 2026, with rankings stable in the 80–92 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University was found in reputation documents, and the university's reputation is stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with comprehensive popularity of about 277,000, short video exposure at a medium-low level, with no obvious signs of increased application attention; no records of enrollment gaps were found in the abnormal enrollment files; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chang'an University only had 'Transportation Engineering' rated as A-, with no A or A+ disciplines, and the number of A- and above disciplines is less than 10; Transportation Engineering is the university's flagship, directly corresponding to majors such as Transportation, Traffic Engineering, and Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering in the enrollment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which is in the same western region as Chongqing, with relatively high regional acceptance; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), not a main source province for non-local students, with no special regional preference impact; majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, and Chang'an University offers related majors, which are attractive to candidates; the social popularity of Civil and Architectural majors is divided, with some showing hesitation or clear discouragement, and the university's Civil Engineering and Architecture majors have lower enrollment rankings; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in this province for 2026 is 209,000, slightly decreased from 2025 (212,851), with an estimated Physics Category of about 136,895 based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 2,583 students (-1.85%) from 2025 (139,478), slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan to expand enrollment by 11 students (+17.2%), the slight decrease of about 1.85% in Physics Category candidates in this province, and the stable university reputation: the expansion slightly reduces competition (ranking number increases), and the decrease in candidates also slightly reduces competition (ranking number decreases), with both directions consistent; however, the recent backward momentum of rankings is strong, and the expansion is insufficient to reverse the long-term downward trend. Taking into account the mitigating effect of the decrease in candidates, after fine-tuning, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 22,711, with a range of 22,211–23,211.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 22,711, with a range of 22,211–23,211. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical, etc.), while Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering) require a sprint (referencing historical Tier 1 major rankings of about 7,100–11,000, far above the predicted range), and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, Architecture, Business Administration) can serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<22,211) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 3404 → 3323 → 3265 → 3204 → 5621 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, they were basically stable in the 3200–3400 range, but in 2025 there was a significant drop to 5621 (a decrease of 2417 positions compared to 2024), showing a clear decline in ranking. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 7, 7, 6, 6, and 13 students respectively. The doubling of the plan in 2025 (from 6 to 13 students) is the direct cause of the significant ranking drop. The 2026 plan is 9 students, a decrease of 4 students (-30.8%) compared to 2025, and the plan adjustment will ease competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 89th, with stable rankings, belonging to the upper-middle level 211. No negative public opinion related to Chang'an University was found in the reputation files; the university's reputation is stable. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with no clear signs of increased application attention. No records of enrollment gaps were found in the abnormal admission files. Chang'an University is primarily engineering-oriented, and its History Category enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Public Administration, Architecture) have no corresponding A- or above discipline evaluations, with no prominent disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), suitable for civil service exam directions. Journalism and Communication has a clear social discouragement, with unfavorable employment prospects. Business Administration has a clear social discouragement. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination takers in the province is 209,000, with an estimated 72,105 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 1,268 people (-1.73%) compared to 2025 (73,373 people), indicating a slight easing of competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which, like Chongqing, is in the western region, with relatively high regional acceptance. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5%, not a major source province for local students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop in 2025 due to enrollment expansion, the planned reduction of 4 students (-30.8%) in 2026, and the slight decrease in the number of History Category candidates in the province: the enrollment reduction intensifies competition (ranking number decreases), while the decrease in candidates slightly eases competition (ranking number decreases), both in the same direction. Taking into account the easing effect of the candidate reduction, after fine-tuning, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 4553, with a range of 4053–5053.

Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration) as the main choice, while Tier 1 majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education) require a sprint (refer to historical Tier 1 major rankings of about 2700–3100), and Tier 3 majors (Administrative Management, Architecture) can serve as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<4053) can focus on sprinting for Law major.
